name: Microwave Oatmeal
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwave-safe container, combine 1/3 cup of oatmeal with 2/3 cup of water.
2. Stir the mixture to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
3. Cook on high for 1 minute if using very hot water.
4. For best results, cook on high for 3 minutes, stirring after each minute.
5. Ensure the container is large enough to allow the porridge to rise during cooking so that it won't boil over and mess up the microwave oven.
Makes one serving.
